title: Pets: Earth
description: Adds all of the Minecraft Earth mobs into PetsMod!
body:
This mod adds all of the mobs from Minecraft Earth into [PetsMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pets-mod), enabling you to use them as your pets! Some of the most iconic Minecraft Earth mobs would be the Moobloom, the Fancy Chicken, and the Cluckshroom. All of these mobs and more are available in Pets Earth!

![Moobloom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a483e9e5015f6569c06571912a3e654e3dad8c43_0.webp)
_The Moobloom_

![Fancy Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dec00c50e8875e39f6f83f6918048128c4981c58_0.webp)
_The Fancy Chicken_

![Cluckshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da20b0caa4838abb6805718555b7e63d71e0585_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Click here for a full list of all of the mobs added!</summary>

**Pigs**
![Pigs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/218a76434e6ec04668ead8affd560d600ae5dd96.png)
_From left to right: mottled pig, muddy pig, pale pig, piebald pig, pink footed pig, sooty pig, spotted pig_

**Sheep**
![Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61b6f4aad76e1130a3d07db1a6d88cfcf78359e5.png)
_From left to right: Flecked sheep, fuzzy sheep, inky sheep, long nosed sheep, patched sheep, rainbow sheep, rocky sheep_

**Cows**
![Cows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15dcdff2febe288dae36ccede485e4a2d61db3f9.png)
_From left to right: Albino cow, ashen cow, cookie cow, cream cow, dairy cow, moobloom, moolip, pinto cow, sunset cow, umbra cow, wooly cow_

**Chickens**
![Chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc73f0fac12e14c4b22f0ad4d604c3849c919888.png)
_From left to right: Amber chicken, bronzed chicken, cluckshroom, fancy chicken, gold crested chicken, midnight chicken, skewbald chicken, stormy chicken_

**Rabbits**
![Rabbits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cc6c78669e659d9a890df9a8fbd62053b45caec.png)
_From left to right: Bold striped rabbit, freckled rabbit, harelequin rabbit, muddy foot rabbit, vested rabbit_

**Misc (1)**
![Misc mobs #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4cd4669fb65df9a96407d41dc39583dd998ff50.png)
_From left to right: Jolly llama, furnace golem, horned sheep, melon golem, tropical slime_

**Misc (2)**
![Misc mobs #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/091963afa596dee6ea9f99b43919d0e0dd36827a.png)
_From left to right: Bouldering zombie, lobber zombie, skeleton wolf, bone spider, dyed cat_

As with any pet from PetsMod, you can use /petspecies to quickly switch between them, or through the config screen. They also have the same interactions as any other pet (turning upside down, riding on players heads, etc.)

</details>

This mod is an add-on for [PetsMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pets-mod) and requires any version above 0.7.4 to work. If you want to learn how to make your own PetsMod addons, a complete guide is available [here](https://github.com/downloadableduck/example-petsmod-addon), along with an example addon.
